seoTitle: Horsfield Bay vs Horsley Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Horsfield Bay and Horsley Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Horsfield Bay vs Horsley Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Horsfield Bay and Horsley Park.
heading: Horsfield Bay vs Horsley Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Horsfield Bay, New South Wales and Horsley Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Horsfield Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Horsley Park (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Horsfield Bay or Horsley Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Horsfield Bay has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Horsley Park scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Horsfield Bay scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Horsley Park scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Horsfield Bay or Horsley Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Horsfield Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
